text:
💡 Keyboard shortcut: Press Ctrl+Shift+V when pasting code into any text field — it pastes plain text instead of formatted HTML.

Saves you from broken code caused by hidden styling. Works in most browsers.

Try it next time you're debugging.
reason: Generic productivity tip without product mention — alternates from tipo_2 — useful for developers across platforms

text:

No files. No uploads to sketchy sites.
